thought.text: It seems there might be an issue with the API responses. Let me try one more approach using a different weather service.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "python3 -c \"import requests; print(requests.get('https://api.weatherstack.com/current?access_key=your_api_key&query=Burbank,IL').json()['current']['temp'])\"", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Get current temperature in Burbank, IL using WeatherStack API"}
